name: Tomato and Spinach Soup
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces frozen chopped spinach, thawed and well-drained
1/4 cup chopped fresh basil or 1 tablespoon dried basil, crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree canned tomatoes with juices in a blender until smooth.
2. Melt butter in a large saucepan over medium-low heat.
3. Add onion and sauté until very tender, about 5 minutes.
4. Stir in tomatoes, sugar, and oregano.
5. Simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Mix in cream, spinach, and basil; simmer for an additional 3 minutes.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Thin the soup with milk if desired.
9. Serve hot from the pot, passing Parmesan cheese on the side.
